items.takeaway: Use successive GPT-5.6 revisions to turn a text-only Three.js brief into an explorable local scene without external assets.
items.body_notes: Givros tests GPT-5.6 Sol on a local Vite and Three.js castle with no CDN, React, Blender export, GLTF, downloaded textures, external assets, or reference image. Across several prompts and corrections, the build gains reusable geometry, lighting, controls, a moat, working drawbridge, animated portcullis, and an explorable interior.
items.decision_reason: Detailed multi-iteration Three.js build with constraints, evolving outputs, and original video evidence.
items.prompt_boundary: The source summarizes the brief and iteration strategy but does not publish exact prompts; omit a prompt block.
